gate.body: This internal dashboard requires staff single sign-on with a passkey.

session.expired: Session expired. Sign in again to continue.
home.title: Operations dashboard
home.body: Select a module from the navigation. Each module page is delivered by its own issue and renders no data until then.

stepup.body: This action requires re-authentication with your passkey.
common.loadError: The data could not be loaded. Try again.
common.actionError: The action could not be completed. No changes were made. Try again.

inventory.empty: No inventory rows match the filters.
partners.col.name: Name
partners.detail.identityMasked: Identifiers are shown masked to their last characters. Full values never render here; a reveal flow with audit logging is not yet specified.
